texto: The great spider never worries itself chasing after its prey with all of its energy and strength. It only exerts its energy each morning to build its web in a magnificent way
autor: relaxes in it and awaits its prey that will miss its path into the web
explicacao: Citação de relaxes in it and awaits its prey that will miss its path into the web sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The great spider never worries itself chasing after its prey with all of its energy and strength.…” articula reflexao, ernest-agyemang-yeboah, energy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e reflexao.
